section.heading: Presidential guidelines

content.p: The authorities granted to the Secretary pursuant to the provisions of this chapter shall be exercised in accordance with procedures and guidelines approved by the President.

section.sourceCredit: (Aug. 1, 1956, ch. 841, title II, § 212, as added Pub. L. 97–241, title II, § 202(b), Aug. 24, 1982, 96 Stat. 290.)

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Oct. 1, 1982, see section 204 of Pub. L. 97–241, set out as a note under section 4301 of this title.
